7:
SELECT Segment FROM (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
          SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END))
         / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END),0) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
    AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    AND ym.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2013-12-31'
  GROUP BY c.Segment
) ORDER BY pct_inc DESC LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment FROM (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
          SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END))
         / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END),0) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
    AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    AND ym.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2013-12-31'
  GROUP BY c.Segment
) ORDER BY pct_inc ASC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN inpatient_pct > outpatient_pct THEN 'Inpatient'
    ELSE 'Outpatient'
  END AS which_more,
  ABS(inpatient_pct - outpatient_pct) AS deviation_percent
FROM (
  SELECT
    100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'Male' AND e.Admission = 'Inpatient' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN e.Admission = 'Inpatient' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS inpatient_pct,
    100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'Male' AND e.Admission = 'Outpatient' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN e.Admission = 'Outpatient' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS outpatient_pct
  FROM Patient p
  JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
);	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction
